variation_files.prompt: A split-screen layout of a video editing software interface, featuring a large central preview window displaying an underwater scene with a diver in yellow fins swimming above a coral reef, surrounded by small fish. To the right, a media library panel shows a grid of thumbnail images, each depicting various underwater scenes with divers and marine life, arranged in two rows. Below the preview window, a multi-track timeline displays several colored video and audio clips arranged across six tracks, with a purple vertical playhead indicating the current position. The entire interface is set against a dark gray background with subtle UI elements, and the top menu bar includes standard editing options. The overall lighting is neutral and digital, typical of a software application window.
